title: Hometown Ghosts

inputs.title: Hometown Ghosts
inputs.theme: coming back to the town that raised you and made you leave

brief: Make a full song acoustic folk-rap song titled "Hometown Ghosts". Center it on: coming, back, town, raised, made, leave, nostalgic, heavy. Keep it grounded and specific — not corny. Tempo 82-90 BPM. References (feel, never copied): none given.
conceptSummary: Acoustic Folk-Rap record for the people back home: coming back to the town that raised you and made you leave — delivered nostalgic, heavy, warm, voiced as plain, honest.

hookOptions.text: Still standing where the record used to be
Tell people I made it out the town
For people, I pray through the town
I been heavy but I never let it show
This one's for the doorstep that raised me

chosenHook.text: Tell people I made it out the town

sections.label: Intro
lines: People, this one's for you

sections.label: Hook
lines: Tell people I made it out the town
Tell people I made it out the town
And people know I hold on for it
Tell people I made it out the town

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nothing in my hands but town and the glow
Came up on leave, dreaming of the flow
They handed me hallway instead of the sound
Grew up on town, chasing the ground

sections.label: Hook
lines: Tell people I made it out the town
Tell people I made it out the town
And people know I hold on for it
Tell people I made it out the town

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Stakes got higher, leave became the art
Everything changed, traded leave for the part
No turning back, I want the railroad and the day
Took that echo and turned it to a way

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Somewhere in the keepsake I found the stream
Wouldn't trade the echo for a team

sections.label: Hook
lines: Tell people I made it out the town

finalLyrics:
[Intro]
People, this one's for you

[Hook]
Tell people I made it out the town
Tell people I made it out the town
And people know I hold on for it
Tell people I made it out the town

[Verse 1]
Nothing in my hands but town and the glow
Came up on leave, dreaming of the flow
They handed me hallway instead of the sound
Grew up on town, chasing the ground

[Hook]
Tell people I made it out the town
Tell people I made it out the town
And people know I hold on for it
Tell people I made it out the town

[Verse 2]
Stakes got higher, leave became the art
Everything changed, traded leave for the part
No turning back, I want the railroad and the day
Took that echo and turned it to a way

[Bridge]
Somewhere in the keepsake I found the stream
Wouldn't trade the echo for a team

[Hook]
Tell people I made it out the town
Tell people I made it out the town
And people know I hold on for it
Tell people I made it out the town

arrangement: Intro: sparse, just the lead motif + vinyl
Hook: full drums in, 808 glide, double the vocal
Verse: pull the pad, let the knock breathe
Bridge: drop drums, swell, then re-enter on the one
Outro: filter the beat down, leave the hook ringing
production.genreBlend: acoustic folk-rap core with melodic/emotional top line
production.mixVibe: wide, warm low end, vocal up front, slight tape saturation

vocals.delivery: nostalgic, heavy, warm delivery, conversational on verses, lifted on the hook
vocals.doublesAndStacks: Double the hook, stack harmonies on the last line of each chorus.

visuals.albumCoverPrompt: Album cover, square 1:1. Cinematic, nostalgic, heavy, warm mood. Subject reflects: Acoustic Folk-Rap record for the people back home: coming back to the town that raised you and made you leave — delivered nostalgic, heavy, warm, voiced as plain, honest.. Visual motifs: coming, back, town, raised. Color: deep shadows, one warm accent light. Film grain, 35mm. No text, no logos, no real-artist likeness. Original styling.
visuals.musicVideoPrompt: Cinematic 16:9 music video. Concept: Acoustic Folk-Rap record for the people back home: coming back to the town that raised you and made you leave — delivered nostalgic, heavy, warm, voiced as plain, honest.. nostalgic, heavy, warm tone, acoustic folk-rap energy. Grounded, not corny; real locations, natural light with one stylized accent. Original — no copyrighted footage or artist mimicry.
sceneIdeas: Opening: slow 16:9 push-in on the subject, nostalgic, heavy, warm light, city at dawn.
Hook: handheld, performance energy, rain on glass.
Bridge: single locked-off wide, subject still while the world moves.
Outro: pull back to reveal the place it all started.
shortFormClipIdeas: Behind-the-scenes studio reaction to the drop
Single-take walk synced to the bridge

agentOutputs.name: HERMES Conductor
agentOutputs.finding: Brief locked: full-song acoustic folk-rap for the people back home.

data.brief: Make a full song acoustic folk-rap song titled "Hometown Ghosts". Center it on: coming, back, town, raised, made, leave, nostalgic, heavy. Keep it grounded and specific — not corny. Tempo 82-90 BPM. References (feel, never copied): none given.
data.concept: Acoustic Folk-Rap record for the people back home: coming back to the town that raised you and made you leave — delivered nostalgic, heavy, warm, voiced as plain, honest.

angles.angle: Tell "coming" through a place you can never go back to
angles.why: An oblique frame forces fresh, specific images instead of the obvious ones.

angles.angle: Anchor the whole song to one image: "bold"
angles.why: A single concrete anchor from an unrelated domain (hope) gives the song a spine and a surprise.

angles.angle: Flip the perspective — write it as a conversation that never happened
angles.why: Re-narrating from an unexpected vantage is the DMN move that lifts originality.

agentOutputs.name: Emotion Scanner
agentOutputs.finding: tenderness · clarity 100/100 → turn toward the fear of losing it.

emotion.guidance: Lead with tenderness (bright, restrained), then turn toward the fear of losing it for depth. Render the feeling in a concrete image, don't name it.
